ob_welcome_body: A self-hosted baby monitor that keeps your family's data private. No cloud, no subscriptions.
ob_feat_browser: Works on any device with a browser
ob_skip: I already have a room — skip setup
ob_create_body: A room connects baby and parent devices. Give it a name you'll recognize.
ob_connect_body: Open this link on your second device, or scan the QR code.
ob_hint: One device is the baby (near the crib), the other is the parent (with you).
home_tagline: Your data never leaves your home. No subscriptions, ever.
home_join_hint: Paste the link you received, or enter the 32-character room ID.
pwa_banner: Install BabyLink as an app for the best experience
js_remove_confirm:
Remove {label} from this device?

The room itself keeps running for anyone with the link.
js_roomid_invalid: Room IDs are 32 hex characters (the part after the last "/" in a shared link).
